name: The Chair
description:
You find yourself trapped in a mechanical chair, with an infinite amount of possibilities. Have fun~!

This is mostly just to write porn without plot. I made it literally just so I could skip the pretenses with other bits and get right to the sexy stuff. Don't think too hard about it.

You can get the chair to do basically anything to you with a bit of suggestion; basically insert kink, output porn.

I'll take suggestions for anything that can be added!
creator: PheasantlyPleasant
